category_sources: Official Pylint GitHub README describes Pylint as a static code analyser for Python.
display_name_sources: Official repository and documentation use the display name Pylint.
docs_sources: Official Pylint documentation is hosted at https://pylint.readthedocs.io/.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project.
tags_sources: Official README describes checking errors, coding standards, and code smells.
source_facts.executables lists pylint, pylint-config, pyreverse, and symilar.
